titleStmt.title: SII 7.389: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 389. (A.R. No. 181-C of 1901). ON A SLAB SET UP IN A LANE AT HOSAKERI IN BARAKUR, SAME TALUK AND DISTRICT.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . gaṇādhipatayē namaḥ . ni¨rvvighnamastu . śubhamastu . namastuṁ gaśira ścuṁbi caṁdracāmara
cāravē . trayilōkyanagarāraṁbhamūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . svastiśrī jayābhyudaya śālivāhana śakavaruṣa
1491 śuklasaṁvatsara saṁda yeraḍaneya pramōdasaṁvatsarada bēsageya tiṁgaḷu kriṣṇa budhavāradalu śrīmaṁnnu
mahārājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa sadāśivarāyamahārāyaru vijayanagariya rājyā
bhyudayadalu śrīmaṁnamahāpradhāna rāja Arasugaḷa nirūpadiṁda saṁkaṇanāyakkarū bārakūru rā
jyava nāḷuva kāladallū maṇigāṟakēriya voḷagaṇa sōmanāthadēvara saṁnidhi hosakēriya voḷagaṇa
mūḍadaśedalū seṭṭiyara maga na baḷiya tiṁmeseṭṭiyaru śrīsomanāthadēvara saṁni
dhiyalu sōmavāra Āmāvāse puṁṇyakāladallū[māḍida dha¨rmma] prati divasadalu bāhma ṇabhōjana ja 6 kkedānadhārā
pū¨rvvakavāgi kaṭisida maṭhada catussīme vivara mūḍalu sōmanāthadēvara gaḍiyiṁda mūḍalu teṁkalu [A]nāḍa tiru
maseṭṭiya maṭhada magilagaḍiyiṁ baḍagalu paḍuvalu naḍava rājabīdiyiṁdaṁ mūḍalu baḍagalu kappeya nāraṇa
seṭṭiya maṭhada magilagaḍiyiṁdaṁ teṁkalu yī cattusīmevoḷagaṇa maṭhakke koṭṭa bāḷa vivara paḍahādiya bā
ḷa gēṇi koḷake bayalalli tāU badda brahmādāya mūlada bāḷa halagadde bānagaddeya cattusīmeya vivara mūḍalu
vaidya kaḷaga ṭṭamaṁtana gaḍiyiṁdaṁ paḍuvalu teṁkalu kiṭṭamareyana gaḍiyiṁdaṁ baḍagalu paḍuvalu
riyakkaḷa makke gaḍiyiṁdaṁ mūḍalu baḍagalu Aḍapatakkeḷa śiva Areyana guḷigade gaḍiyiṁdaṁ teṁkalu yi
ṁttī gaḍiyoḷage bittuva bedegaṇagilu nāgaṁḍugadalu gadde mū 5 . mattaṁ kaṭṭina gaddeya catusīmeya vivara
mūḍalu hariva sāliṁdaṁ paḍuvalu teṁkalu Aḍapakkana gaḍiyiṁdaṁ baḍagalu paḍuvalu kallagadde guḷi gadde
yiṁ mūḍalu baḍagalu nīru hariva sāliṁdaṁ teṁkalu yiṁtī catusīmeyiṁdoḷage bituva gade mu 3 mattaṁ gu
ḷigaddeya vivara mūḍalu sāliṁda paḍuvalu teṁkalu kiṭṭamareyana geḍiyiṁda baḍagalu paḍuvalu Areyakkaḷa
gaḍiyiṁdaṁ mūḍalu baḍagalu Areyakkaḷa gaḍiyiṁ teṁkkalu yiṁttī gaḍiyiṁdoḷage gadde mū 1 baḷigaddeya vivara
hariva sāliṁda paḍuvalu Adara takkaḷagaḍiyiṁ baḍagalu maṇigārakēriya halara gaḍiyiṁ mūḍalu nāru bālese
ṭṭiya gaḍiyiṁ teṁkalu yiṁttī gaḍiyoḷage gadde mu 1 morabinagadde vivara maṇigārakēriya halara gaddeyiṁ pa
ḍuvalu nāru bāleseṭṭiya gaḍiyiṁ baḍagalu ka¨rttara gaḍiyiṁ mūḍalu kōṭekērihalara gaḍiyiṁ teṁkalu yiṁttī
gaḍiyoḷage gadde mu ... saṁkarareyana vālamikemallagaddeya vivara morabinagaddeyiṁ paḍuvalu Attappareya
na gaḍiyiṁ mūḍalu yiṁttī gaḍiyoḷage gadde mū . yidara kūḍaṇa maneAḍi bāvi hēṟeṁgadde mu 11 .
ge gēṇi A mu 44 . ge hiriyadēvara dēvasva A mu 11 taṁmeṇaṁseṭṭi bastige A mu 1 ... vubheyaṁ A mu 12 ...
śuddha Ā mu 31 ... maṇavūralu teṁkabeṁgareyalli beṭṭaḍiyoḷage bāḷa catusīmeya vivara cōḷikēriya
halara gaḍiyiṁdaṁ paḍuvalu Ajjara viṣṇumayyara gaḍiyiṁdaṁ mūḍalu yiṁttī gaḍiyoḷage gadde mu [1 .] mattaṁ
Aṁṇahēraḷa gaḍiyiṁdaṁ paḍuvalu Ajjara viṣṇumayyara gaḍiyiṁdaṁ mūḍalu yiṁttī gaḍiyoḷage gadde
mu . kōṇakureya vivara Aṁṇahēraḷagaḍimayyara gaḍiyiṁdaṁ paḍuvalu kēśahēraḷamane gaḍiyiṁdaṁ
mūḍalu yiṁttī gaḍiyoḷage gadde mu . mattaṁ koḷakaya tāra vivara mūḍa taṁma vuḷida gaḍiyiṁdaṁ paḍuvalu
teṁkkalu kaggāyagaṇapana be(ṁ)mmaseṭṭi gaḍiyiṁ baḍagalu paḍuvalu vaidyara gaḍiyiṁ mūḍa
baḍaga Alakhaseṭṭiya gaḍiyiṁ teṁkka yiṁttī gaḍiyoḷage gadde mu 1 nālku ṭhāvu saha mu 2 mane
Aḍiya vivara mūḍa koḷakeya tāruṁ hittilagade gaḍiyiṁ paḍuvalu teṁka ka¨rttara Aṁṇahēraḷaga
ḍiyiṁ baḍaga paḍuva samudrada gaḍiyiṁ mūḍa baḍaga vaidyara gaḍiyiṁ teṁkka yidaroḷage ma
ra pala saha yidakkuḷa gēṇi Akki mu 11 kaṁ teru brā(ṁ)hmaṇa haḍitāraśūdra haḍitāra 1 teru dēvasva kaḷadu śuddha Ā
kki mu 8 mattaṁ teṁka beṁgareyoḷage kṛṣṇahēraḷa maga narāyaṇa hēraḷu Aruvaḷa mūlāḍiya baḍaga baḷina
catusīme vivara kereyiṁdaṁ paḍuvalu tiṁmeseṭṭiyara ka¨rttara gaḍiyiṁdaṁ mūḍalu yiṁttī catusīme
yoḷage bittuva gadde mu 0ø . teru dēvasvakaḷadu sudhdha A mu 9 pāraṁbaḷiyalu paḍuvakere mūḍalu hā
paḍuva teṁkalu maṇigāṟakēriya halara gaḍiyiṁ baḍaga paḍuva samudrada gaḍiyiṁ mūḍa baḍaga Ava
dhūta Aḍigaḷa gaḍiyiṁ teṁka yī nālku gaḍiyoḷage gadde mū 1 . teru kaḷadu suddha A mu 6 mattaṁ kōṭeyoḷage
haṁmu bēhāriya kayya Āruvārava māḍikoṁḍa tarina catussīmeya vivara mūḍa hoḷeyiṁdaṁ paḍuva
teṁkka ka¨rttara gaḍiyiṁda baḍaga paḍuva samudradiṁda mūḍa baḍaga seṭṭikāṟa bēhāriya biṁnada tā
riṁda teṁkka yiṁttī nālku gaḍiyoḷage bittuva gadde mu . suddha naḍava Ā mu 5 mattaṁ seṭṭikāṟa bēhāri
kayya Āruvārava māḍikoṁḍa tārina catusīmeya vivara hoḷeyiṁda paḍuva ka¨rttara vuḷida gaḍiyi
ṁda baḍaga samudradiṁ mūḍa taṁmyeṇaseṭṭiya gaḍiyiṁda teṁkka yiṁttī nālku gaḍiyeḷage bittuva gadde mu
1 . suddha naḍava Ā mu 12 mattaṁ saṁkarakāraṁtaniṁda Āruvārava māḍikoṁḍa kallagaddeya catussī
meya vivara hoḷeyiṁda paḍuva ka¨rtara gaḍiyiṁda baḍaga samudradiṁ mūḍa maṇigārakēriya
halara gaḍiyiṁdaṁ teṁka yiṁttī nālkugaḍiyoḷage bittuva gade mu 0Ø teru dēvasva kaḷadu suddha naḍava
Ākki mu 4 thāḷayāḍiyavoḷage tāvu badha bra(ṁ)hmadāyada mulada bāḷa cattusīmeya vivara muḍe cauḷiyakēriya
halara gaḍiyiṁdaṁ daraya baḷiya gaḍiyiṁdaṁ paḍuva teṁka Āriya baḷiyavara gaḍiyiṁdaṁ baḍaga paḍuva haḷanihādi
yiṁdaṁ mūḍa kuṁdeyaseṭiya māvinagadeyiṁdaṁ teṁka yiṁttī nālku catussīmeyiṁdoḷaguḷa māvinagade mu 3 tāraṁ
mūvattārahāḷaya catusīmeya vivara mūḍa kuṁdeyaseṭṭiya gaḍiyiṁdaṁ paḍuva teṁka cauḷiyakēriya halara gaḍi
yiṁdaṁ baḍaga paḍuva kuṁdeyaseṭiya Āruvarāna gaḍiyiṁdaṁ mūḍa baḍaga tāḷagira gaḍiyiṁdaṁ teṁka yiṁtī nā
lku catussīmeyiṁdoḷaguḷa hāḷi mu . 0 mattaṁ maneya manegaddeya catussīmeya vivara mūḍa bacaliṁdaṁ paḍuva teṁka
harida bacaliṁdaṁ baḍaga paḍuva taṁmināyakara gaḍiyiṁdaṁ mūḍa kuṁdeyaseṭiya siriyāranavara gaḍiyiṁdaṁ teṁka yiṁttī
nāluku catussīmeyiṁdoḷaguḷa maneya malagade kuṁdeyaseṭṭiya maneya malagadeyiṁ teṁkaluḷa makki malagadde
[Ā] bayalu makki malagade saha mu 6 yidake gēṇi Aki teru kaḷadu mu 13 Aṁttu Aki muḍi 193 . Akṣaradalu nūratoṁ
bata muru kalu dinavaṁdake Uṁba bramara jana 120 ke Aki muḍi 120 Āmāsege dinamodala Adityamaṭhake dina 1 ke jana 6
lu dōse pāyasa kāyālu Annasuddhi naḍasuvadake Akki mū 14 srāvaṇi cavitti paḍitiṁgaḷa caviti hōma 2 ke Aki mu 3 . dhanu[¨rmmā]sege ja
na 4 lekkadalli Aki mu 14 Aṁttu maṭhada saṁmaṁdha Akki mu 151 . dēvapujege gōpināthadēvara naivēdyake Aki mu 18 naṁdādīvigege
muṟudīvige A¨rtti saha yeṁṇe haḍa 4 . ge Aki mu 8 nityahuvige Aki mu 1 gaṁdha dhupake Aki mu 1 Annaśuddhi Aki
mu 1 Ugādihabba modalāda samasta pa¨rvvatithige Aki mu 6 vubhayaṁ veca Aki mu 19 . yi dha¨rmma
kapilenu va¨rṇāsili koṁdhaṁta papake hōguvaru .
Digital edition of SII 7.389 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
